creator: bob@eager.cx
text:
Created attachment 211922
shar file containing the port files

This port is the first of three. It is a dependency for the other two, which will be submitted once this is committed.

It is only documentation files (no build). It exists separately because some of the files are potentially shared between the two other ports, and there would be a file conflict if they were included in both. Also, some of these files are optional but also shared.

Info: the other two ports will be simh-hp2100 and simh-hp3000.
